original_snippet_context: News report on telegrams sent to the president of São Paulo state congratulating him on the agreement reached regarding the Convênio de Taubaté and the valorization of coffee.
justification: The article mentions the "Convênio de Taubaté" in the context of its successful conclusion, which implicitly relates to the "Caixa de Conversão" as a key element of the plan, but doesn't express any particular stance on the monetary aspects.
